summary: Potentially the highest‑quality recording of this show, though details are sparse
review: The lone review suggests this may be the best‐sounding source among those archived for the concert, but provides no concrete information about the mix, source type, or performance. Without specific comments on soundboard vs. audience or musical highlights, the assessment remains tentative.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer hints this may be the best‑quality version available, but gives no specifics on clarity, mix balance, or source.
